name: FF_USER_COLUMNS_VL
query: SELECT B.USER_COLUMN_ID USER_COLUMN_ID, B.BASE_USER_COLUMN_NAME BASE_USER_COLUMN_NAME, TL.USER_COLUMN_NAME, B.USER_TABLE_ID USER_TABLE_ID, B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, B.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, B.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, B.DATA_TYPE DATA_TYPE, B.FORMULA_ID FORMULA_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, B.SGUID SGUID FROM FF_USER_COLUMNS B, FF_USER_COLUMNS_TL TL WHERE B.USER_COLUMN_ID = TL.USER_COLUMN_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
